title: Minimal Case
summary: A compact case-pack proving that case.json can lint and render two derived views.

messages.author: user
messages.summary: User asks for a stable case-pack contract.

messages.author: agent
messages.summary: Agent returns linted and rendered case-pack views.

events.title: User asks for a case-pack contract
events.summary: The conversation starts with a request to make case-pack lintable and renderable.

events.title: Single source of truth is fixed
events.summary: case.json is treated as canonical while timeline and lifted views are renderer outputs.

tool_events.summary: Renderer emits timeline and lifted markdown from the same case.json.
tool_events.why_it_matters: It proves the markdown views are derived, not manually edited facts.

timeline.title: Request arrives
timeline.summary: The case begins with a request for a stable case-pack intermediate format.

timeline.title: Derived views render
timeline.summary: The renderer produces timeline and lifted markdown from case.json.

turning_points.title: Derived views stop being manual facts
turning_points.summary: The decisive move is to make rendered markdown reproducible from case.json.

questions.title: What is the source of truth?
questions.summary: case.json must own facts while markdown files remain derived views.

misconceptions.title: Markdown views are not canonical
misconceptions.summary: timeline.md and lifted.md should not become parallel fact stores.

resolutions.title: Render views from the JSON source
resolutions.summary: Lint the anchors first, then render stable markdown views from case.json.
